mosquitoR 1.9.0
  • Reference
    • Mosquito Alert Modeling Pipeline

Build a unified vector presence dataset

Source: R/initialize_vector_dataset.R
initialize_vector_dataset.Rd

Combines previously prepared Mosquito Alert and/or GBIF vector observations for a given location into a single presence-only dataset with harmonised columns. The helper looks for the size-specific vector files generated by get_malert_data() and get_gbif_data() and merges them when requested.

Usage

initialize_vector_dataset(
  iso3,
  admin_level,
  admin_name,
  sources = c("malert", "gbif"),
  vector_dirs = "data/proc",
  output_dir = "data/proc",
  overwrite = FALSE,
  exclude_collection_on_merge = "Mosquito Alert Tiger Mosquito"
)

Arguments

iso3

Three-letter ISO3 country code used in the vector filenames.

admin_level

Administrative level included in the vector filenames.

admin_name

Administrative unit name used in the vector filenames.

sources

Character vector specifying which vector sources to include. Accepted values are "malert", "gbif", or both. Default includes both.

vector_dirs

Character vector of directories to search for the prepared vector files. Defaults to "data/proc".

output_dir

Directory where the combined dataset will be saved. Defaults to "data/proc".

overwrite

Logical; set to TRUE to overwrite an existing output file. Defaults to FALSE.

exclude_collection_on_merge

Character vector of GBIF collectionCode values to drop when both sources are merged. Defaults to discarding "Mosquito Alert Tiger Mosquito" when Mosquito Alert data is present. Use NULL to keep all collection codes.

Value

A tibble with columns date, year, lon, lat, presence, referenceID, and source. Attributes include output_path and source_files.

On this page
